creator: cowbert@gmail.com
text:
For UPDATING:

yyyymmdd:
    AFFECTS: users of databases/freetds
    freetds has been updated to the latest patched stable version
0.82.1-dev-20081111. The libtds library has been rolled into libsybdb.
Users should rebuild all ports linked to libtds. Run something like:
#  portupgrade -rf databases/freetds
